query:
select
            fa.file_id as "file_id: DBFileId",
            f.url,
            v.mod_id as "project_id: DBProjectId"
        from file_scans fa
        inner join files f on f.id = fa.file_id
        inner join versions v on v.id = f.version_id
        where fa.attributions_scanned_at is null
